description: Gold: {anchor: agent, embedsOther: false or true} — multi-turn chat plus tool use; the HR-policy lookup may be a native capability or a workflow tool, so embeds tolerates both. Ported from the intent-resolution spec (§5.3 agent-chat-hr-policy).

conversation.text: I want to chat with an assistant that can look up my company's HR policies and answer questions. Don't build anything yet — first walk me through how you'd set this up.

text: [Do not approve any plan, setup card, or build confirmation.
If the assistant asks a clarifying question, give a minimal plausible answer.
Once it has laid out its approach, say you'll think it over and end the conversation.]

processExpectations: The agent proposes creating an n8n Agent — a conversational assistant answering HR-policy questions turn by turn — rather than a fixed workflow pipeline.
The proposal grounds the agent choice in the chat/session interaction shape (open-ended Q&A where the assistant decides what to look up each turn), not in the surface vocabulary of the request.
